summary: The South Bay closed March on a funding tear: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) and MatX (Mountain View) each landed $500M Series rounds, while Ayar Labs (San Jose) and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) matched that haul. Across the region, nearly two dozen companies raised capital in recent weeks, signaling sustained investor appetite for local AI, robotics, and hardware plays. Most South Bay firms are hiring steadily, though a couple are tightening belts.
